choices.text: Foundry fuzz tests + invariant tests + fork testing. fuzz auto-generates inputs; invariant checks always-true properties under random sequences; fork tests run against real mainnet state. Catches edge cases manual misses.

questions.explanation: Foundry fuzz + invariant + fork = thorough coverage.

choices.text: Wagmi + viem + RainbowKit + TanStack Query. viem typed contracts; Wagmi React hooks; RainbowKit wallet UX. 2024+ standard.

Optimistic rollups (Arbitrum/Optimism/Base): EVM-equivalent, drop-in deploy, 7-day withdraw. ZK rollups (zkSync/Polygon zkEVM/Scroll): faster withdraws (minutes-hours), some compat quirks. OP-stack for max ecosystem reuse.

questions.explanation: Optimistic compat + slow vs. ZK fast + quirks.

choices.text: Gnosis Safe multi-sig + TimelockController with 48-72h delay. Multi-sig prevents single-key rug; timelock gives users exit window before malicious changes. Standard for Uniswap, Aave, Compound.

Pause + white-hat self-exploit to safe address + fix + return funds + public postmortem within 48-72h. Transparency preserves trust; silence destroys it. Bug bounty programs (Immunefi) reduce these scenarios.
